title: Chris Womack Awarded Honorary Doctorate from Georgia Tech
text: ATLANTA , Dec. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southern Company President and CEO Chris Womack was awarded an honorary doctorate in philosophy from the Georgia Institute of Technology on Saturday, Dec. 16, 2023. Calling it "the most important honor the university can confer to an individual," Georgia Tech President Ángel Cabrera noted Womack's "unyielding commitment and service to the university.

title: The Virginia Natural Gas Foundation Donates $60,000 to Address Food Insecurity in South Hampton Roads
text: VIRGINIA BEACH, Va. , Dec. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Virginia Natural Gas Foundation has awarded a $60,000 grant to support the Children's Health Investment Program (CHIP) of South Hampton Roads' initiative to improve the health and well-being of children and families in southeastern Virginia.

title: Southern's (SO) Unit Secures Approval to Cover Cost Overruns
text: Southern's (SO) subsidiary, Georgia Power, secures regulatory approval to pass $7.56 billion Vogtle nuclear project overruns to customers. Delays and cost hikes raise concerns.

title: Bentina C. Terry named president and CEO of Southern Company telecom subsidiaries
text: Arnab Ghosal named Southern Telecom chief operating officer ATLANTA , Dec. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southern Linc announced today that Bentina C. Terry has been named president and CEO of Southern Communications with responsibility to lead Southern Linc and Southern Telecom, Inc. (STI).

title: 4 Ideal December Dividend Fortune 500 Industry Leaders (Of 68)
text: The Summer 2023 edition of Fortune Magazine revealed 500 biggest U.S. companies by revenue. Dogcatcher's quest to sniff out the best dividend buys focused on 68 industry leaders using YCharts 12/14/23 data. Those 68 industry leaders were segmented into 21 business sectors, ranging (alphabetically) from apparel to wholesalers. 3 of the 68 were private or foreign exchange listed firms not tracked by YCharts, leaving 65 listed. 58 dividend yielding stocks led those 68 industry leaders and ranged 0.17% to 9.08% in annual yield and ranged -15.07% to 36.4% in broker estimated one-year price target upsides by YCharts 12/14/23 reckoning.

title: The Southern Company Just Gave Us a Hint About When Its Dividend Will Grow Again
text: Southern Company has increased its dividend or held it steady for over 70 years. Over the past decade, dividend growth has been mired in the low single digits, roughly keeping up with inflation.

title: Southern Company Is Back in the Solar Market. Is the Stock a Buy?
